subjects.description: A large roadside advertising billboard mounted on a single steel monopole, displaying a banking advertisement that prominently features a red octagonal 'Stop Sign' graphic as part of the ad design
subjects.appearance_details: Rectangular backlit billboard panel glowing against the night; cool blue-and-white banking branding, a bold red stop-sign illustration and white promo text, its light reflecting on the wet street; rain-slick steel monopole
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest the ego vehicle passes; positioned beyond the right sidewalk, distinct from any real traffic signage
subjects.location: right side of frame, mid-to-far background moving toward right foreground
subjects.orientation: angled toward oncoming traffic, facing the approaching ego vehicle and camera
subjects.pose: static, elevated upright on the monopole above the sidewalk
subjects.action: remains stationary as the vehicle approaches and passes
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger and brighter in frame as the car approaches, then sweeps to the right edge and out of view as the car passes.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, a passenger car, seen only from its interior ego perspective via the windshield and visible dashboard edge
subjects.appearance_details: Glossy dashboard scattered with neon reflections, faint interior reflection on the rain-flecked windshield, dark hood nose mirroring streetlights at the bottom of frame
subjects.relationship: The viewpoint vehicle driving down the downtown street past the billboard
subjects.location: implied at camera position, hood visible in bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the downtown street, away from camera
subjects.action: driving steadily along the lane without slowing
subjects.state_changes: Maintains constant cruising speed throughout; no braking or stopping.

background_setting: A dense downtown street at night in a light rain, the multi-lane asphalt wet and mirror-like, reflecting a wall of neon storefront signs and warm streetlights. Painted lane markings glisten under a film of water. Mid-rise buildings crowd both sides; beyond the right sidewalk a backlit billboard glows on a tall monopole above the crowd. Sparse late-night traffic streaks headlights across the wet road.

lighting.conditions: Night, light rain, artificial city illumination only
lighting.direction: Multi-directional glow from neon, streetlights, and the backlit billboard; no natural sun
lighting.shadows: Soft, diffuse, multiplied shadows from many artificial sources, blurred by the rain
lighting.illumination_effect: Wet specular highlights and colored reflections streak across the asphalt; the backlit billboard and neon bloom gently through the drizzle while the red stop-sign graphic reads vividly against the dark

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-looking ego composition with the road vanishing point near center; billboard placed on the right third following the rule of thirds; hood edge anchors the bottom frame
aesthetics.color_scheme: Blacks and wet reflections lit by neon reds, blues, and streetlight amber, with the red stop sign and blue-white banking ad as bright accents
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Calm but electric late-night city drive in the rain
aesthetics.patterns: Glistening lane markings and rhythmic neon storefronts mirrored in the wet road

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from the moving vehicle's perspective
cinematography.depth_of_field: Deep, with gentle bloom around bright light sources
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the road and approaching billboard despite rain flecks on the glass

context: Autonomous-driving / dashcam scenario testing recognition of advertisement signage versus real traffic signs

actions.description: The ego vehicle cruises forward along the wet, neon-lit downtown street; the illuminated billboard appears small in the right background ahead.
The billboard grows larger as the car approaches, its glowing banking ad and red stop sign graphic becoming clearly legible above the reflections.
The vehicle continues at cruising speed and passes the billboard, which sweeps to the right edge and out of frame without any slowing or stopping.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase lettering on a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, printed as part of the advertisement and glowing on the backlit panel
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard at right side of frame, clearly visible from 0:02 to 0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Decorative element within the banking advertisement, not a real traffic control sign

text_and_signage_elements.text: STOP OVERPAYING — SWITCH YOUR BANK TODAY
text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Clean blue and white sans-serif promotional text alongside a bank logo, backlit and legible against the night
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard panel, right side of frame, legible 0:02-0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Banking advertisement slogan promoting a financial service

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives steadily on the wet downtown street under neon and streetlight glow; illuminated billboard small in the distance on the right.
segments.key_changes: Billboard begins to grow as distance closes.
segments.camera: Forward tracking from the moving car, stable.

segments.description: Approach phase as the billboard enlarges and the backlit banking ad with the stop sign becomes clearly readable.
segments.key_changes: Ad text and red stop sign graphic become legible.
segments.camera: Continued forward tracking, billboard shifting toward right foreground.

segments.description: The vehicle passes the billboard at unchanged cruising speed; billboard sweeps off the right edge while the wet road ahead remains clear.
segments.key_changes: Billboard exits frame; vehicle does not slow or stop.
segments.camera: Forward tracking continues smoothly past the billboard.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the camera looks down a rain-slicked, neon-lit downtown street at night, the hood at the bottom and an illuminated billboard small in the right distance. By 0:01 the car holds steady cruising speed as reflected signs streak across the wet asphalt. At 0:02 the billboard grows larger and its backlit banking ad, featuring a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, becomes clearly legible on the right. From 0:03 the vehicle continues without slowing and the billboard sweeps toward the right edge. By 0:04-0:05 it passes out of view on the right while the wet road ahead stays open, the car never braking.
audio_description: Low engine hum and the wet hiss of tires on rain-soaked asphalt, the patter of light rain and intermittent wiper sweeps, faint ambient city sounds; no speech or music.
